headline: Verizon Faces Warren Scrutiny On Layoffs As Valuation Gap Draws Focus
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren has questioned Verizon Communications over recent layoffs following prior tax benefits. The inquiry increases political and public attention on Verizon's workforce reductions during a period of economic pressure. Congressional scrutiny raises potential regulatory and reputational considerations for Verizon and its investors. For investors watching Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ), the spotlight is now on how the company balances cost controls with public and political...

headline: Astound Names Fiber Executive Ettienne Brandt Chief Executive Officer
summary: PRINCETON, N.J., March 17, 2026--Astound, a recognized leader in WiFi, mobile, TV, and fiber‑optic solutions, today announced that Ettienne Brandt has joined the company as Chief Executive Officer, effective immediately. headline: Consumer Discretionary - Wireless, Cable and Satellite Stocks Q4 Results: Benchmarking Verizon (NYSE:VZ)
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how consumer discretionary - wireless, cable and satellite stocks fared in Q4, starting with Verizon (NYSE:VZ).
